label: Transparent waterfall plunge motif source
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only a dramatic waterfall plunge motif for a theme named "Morphous Waterfall", isolated full subject, no text.
Scene/backdrop: rainforest gorge distilled into a compact cutout motif.
Subject: a vertical white-water waterfall plunging into mist, framed by emerald moss on dark wet rock, with spray ribbons, stepped basalt ledges, small fern silhouettes, and turbulent plunge-pool foam. The subject should read as a single cohesive landscape motif, not a full scenic background.
Composition/framing: centered complete motif with generous padding; do not crop the waterfall, rocks, moss, or plunge foam. Strong vertical cascade silhouette, dramatic landing-system feel, premium natural texture.
Lighting/mood: humid rainforest daylight, white water highlights, deep rock shadows, emerald moss accents, cinematic but clean.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no people, no animals, no buildings, no paths, no text, no watermark, no decorative frame, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection outside the subject.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Waterfall" derived from the visible transparent waterfall plunge motif.
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from white water, emerald moss, wet basalt rock, plunge-pool mist, gorge shadows, and vertical cascade geometry. This light board is the primary reference for coding a dramatic landing system.
Canvas: 3840x2160, wide 16:9, crisp high-resolution source board, large readable labels.
Required visible sections: Morphous Waterfall, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Hero/Landing, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples with Geist and Noto Sans JP guidance; dramatic landing headlines paired with disciplined product UI labels.
UI coverage: primary/secondary/ghost buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, pricing/feature strip, table rows, search command, top navigation, landing hero module, metric cards, charts, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, precise grid, 8px card radius, white-water primary actions, emerald moss accents, rock-border structure, misty translucent surfaces, vertical cascade dividers, cinematic but usable landing-system layout.
Constraints: no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no beige/brown dominant palette, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Waterfall", no tiny illegible token tables.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a dark-mode version of the visible Morphous Waterfall light design-system board. It must feel like the same system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the visible transparent waterfall plunge motif and the visible light-mode board as references. Preserve the white-water primary actions, emerald moss accents, basalt rock structure, mist texture, vertical cascade dividers, dramatic landing-system hero treatment, Japanese typography, and shadcn/tweakcn component coverage.
Canvas: 3840x2160, wide 16:9, crisp high-resolution source board, large readable labels.
Required visible sections: Morphous Waterfall, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Hero/Landing, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Visual details: deep wet-rock background, pale white-water text, emerald moss primary and accent states, basalt cards, mist-blue focus rings, spray-glass overlays, bright foam highlights, restrained contrast, cinematic landing-system presence with practical product UI density.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, pricing/feature strip, table rows, search command, top navigation, landing hero module, metric cards, charts, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples.
Constraints: no neon colors, no unrelated saturated colors, no purple gradients, no flat pure-black-only background, no illegible text, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Waterfall", no tiny unreadable token tables.
